name: Shane Global Holding Inc.
summary: Shane Global Holding Inc. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of indoor furniture. The company offers sofas, beds, footrests, dining chairs, etc.; and other products comprising indoor furniture accessories, fluff-filled toys and leather garments, etc. It sells its products to retail stores in North America. The company was founded in 2014 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.
